118240f9-d764-46a6-ae29-70a960d36d1b.title: Golrie
118240f9-d764-46a6-ae29-70a960d36d1b.text:
Oh, don't worry, I'm totally fine. I locked myself in
here for protection, but I've left the key somewhere.

5262c95e-3d10-4a21-a631-d676c0afcb79.title: <player>
5262c95e-3d10-4a21-a631-d676c0afcb79.text: Okay... I'll have a look for a key.

f2bcae24-a2d9-480f-bca7-982bdf58f28c.text: You use the key to unlock the gate.

5f6a3391-b0b2-4689-8fa8-220bb98b57fc.title: Note
5f6a3391-b0b2-4689-8fa8-220bb98b57fc.text: teleports player to otherside of door

11983f01-1429-4f42-a866-89eded7d2739.title: Golrie
11983f01-1429-4f42-a866-89eded7d2739.text:
What are you doing down here? Leave before you get
yourself into trouble.

77615eb7-d9d1-410c-ad87-37177988e47d.title: Note
77615eb7-d9d1-410c-ad87-37177988e47d.text: waterfall quest stage - find glarials pebble

d036904a-926c-420f-bd99-0673aceefd36.title: Note
